## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test update

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] This is an AI-generated change (mark if yes)
